hero.title: Slayerbound Wiki
hero.description: Your ultimate hub for Slayerbound! Master breathing styles, unlock powerful clans, and dominate demon battles. Get working codes, clan tier lists, training guides, and boss strategies to become the ultimate demon slayer!

gameFeature.title: Slayerbound Trailer
gameFeature.description: Master breathing styles, unlock powerful clans, and dominate demon battles in this action-packed Demon Slayer RPG experience on Roblox!

whatIs.title: What is
whatIs.description: Slayerbound is a Demon Slayer-themed action RPG on Roblox. Master breathing styles, unlock powerful clans, and battle demons in intense combat.

features.title: Breathing Styles
features.description: Master powerful breathing techniques like Flame, Wind, and Water

features.title: Clan System
features.description: Unlock and upgrade powerful clans with unique abilities

features.title: Demon Battles
features.description: Fight challenging demons and bosses to earn rewards

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Slayerbound

questions.question: How do I attack and block in Slayerbound?
questions.answer: LMB = Attack, RMB = Heavy Attack, F = Block.

questions.question: How do I run in Slayerbound?
questions.answer: Double-tap W (W+W) to run.

questions.question: How do I open menu and breathing in Slayerbound?
questions.answer: M = Menu, G = Breathing.

questions.question: How do I use skill keys in Slayerbound?
questions.answer: Use 1-9 for skills.

questions.question: How do I redeem Slayerbound codes?
questions.answer: Open the Codes button/menu, input code, then redeem/enter.

questions.question: Why does a Slayerbound code not work?
questions.answer: Most common reasons: expired, typo, already used.

questions.question: Are Slayerbound codes case-sensitive?
questions.answer: Treat them as case-sensitive and paste exactly as listed.

questions.question: What rewards do Slayerbound codes usually give?
questions.answer: Common rewards include Spins, Yen, and specific reset effects.

questions.question: Where should I track new Slayerbound codes first?
questions.answer: Official Discord, Roblox game page/community posts, and active guide trackers.

questions.question: Is there an official Slayerbound Trello?
questions.answer: Yes, an official Slayerbound Trello link is publicly shared.

questions.question: What training paths are available in Slayerbound?
questions.answer: Flame, Wind, and Water are the main training paths.

questions.question: What does Slayerbound Flame training require?
questions.answer: Collect 40 Oni Horns and defeat strong Oni enemies.

questions.question: What does Slayerbound Wind training require?
questions.answer: Fight Giga Horn boss in Demon Camp until the horn drops.

questions.question: What does Slayerbound Water training require?
questions.answer: Complete parkour challenge and break the rock. Final step costs 2,000 Yen per attempt.

questions.question: Which Slayerbound code can reset breathing/demon art?
questions.answer: Example: 1KLIKES resets breathing/demon art and may also reset race.

questions.question: Are there stats-reset codes in Slayerbound?
questions.answer: Yes, milestone codes include stats reset entries.

questions.question: Do Slayerbound code pools change often?
questions.answer: Yes, lists update frequently around milestones and bug-fix windows.

questions.question: Are exact boss drop rates known in Slayerbound?
questions.answer: Drop rates are not publicly confirmed by developers.

questions.question: What is the best Yen farming route in Slayerbound?
questions.answer: Redeem active codes first, then follow progression routes while managing costs.

questions.question: Should I commit to one build early in Slayerbound?
questions.answer: Not recommended—test routes and controls first, then use resets strategically.

resetPlanner.title: Slayerbound
resetPlanner.subtitle: Plan your resets strategically - never reset blindly

decisions.question: Core stats feel misallocated?
decisions.yesAction: Check if you have a stats-reset code available
decisions.noAction: Check if Breathing/Demon Art is off-meta for your goal

decisions.question: Do you have a stats-reset code available?
decisions.yesAction: Use Stats Reset Now - Apply reset, then rebuild around your target mode (PvE/PvP/Hybrid)
decisions.noAction: Delay Reset and Farm Resources - Use active spin/yen codes and progression route first

decisions.question: Breathing/Demon Art is off-meta for your goal?
decisions.yesAction: Can you use a breathing/demon-art reset code now?
decisions.noAction: Keep Build, Optimize Execution - Focus on controls mastery before rerolling

decisions.question: Can you use a breathing/demon-art reset code now?
decisions.yesAction: Use Breathing/Demon Art Reset - Known reset examples include resets that can also affect race
decisions.noAction: Do Not Panic Reset - Wait for next milestone/update code drop; track Discord announcements
